$schema.description: Optional editor schema reference used for validation and autocomplete.

localPath.description: Local path to the Git repository managed by RepoFlow. Relative paths are resolved from the directory containing .repo-flow.json.

expectedOrigins.description: Accepted origin remote URLs. RepoFlow stops when the current repository origin is not listed.

baseBranch.description: Branch used as the source for issue branches and expected pull-request target.

repository.description: GitHub repository identity and base-branch settings.

manifestPath.description: Repository-relative path to the issue manifest used by issue sync.

requireCleanWorkingTree.description: Stop before branch or file mutations when the working tree is not clean.

deleteMergedLocalBranches.description: Delete a local branch only after its pull request is confirmed merged into the configured base branch.

pruneRemoteReferences.description: Prune stale remote-tracking branch references during cleanup.

signOffCommits.description: Use git commit -s and append a Signed-off-by trailer. This is DCO sign-off, not cryptographic commit signing.

preCommitFixAttempts.description: Number of focused automatic agent attempts after a git commit is blocked by a pre-commit hook.

provider.description: Coding-agent provider. Supported values are codex and claude.

command.description: Executable name or path used to start the coding agent.

model.description: Agent model passed explicitly to the selected CLI with --model. This is independent of the CLI executable version.

minimumCliVersion.description: Optional minimum semantic version for the configured agent CLI. Use null to allow any installed version.

heartbeatSeconds.description: Interval in seconds between agent progress messages.

runProjectChecks.description: Whether the agent is instructed to run project checks defined by AGENTS.md.

reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort used for initial issue implementation and PR review-feedback runs.

ciFixReasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort used for focused automatic CI-fix runs. A lower value reduces usage for narrow fixes.

preCommitFixReasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort used for focused fixes after a pre-commit hook blocks git commit.

createDraft.description: Create new pull requests as drafts when true.

templatePath.description: Repository-relative path to the pull-request template.

mergeMethod.description: Merge method used by pr merge and pr accept.

deleteBranchOnMerge.description: Delete the remote head branch after GitHub confirms a successful merge.

initialCommit.description: Commit message template for the initial issue implementation.

reviewCommit.description: Commit message template for changes based on PR review feedback.

ciFixCommit.description: Commit message template for focused automatic CI fixes.

pullRequestTitle.description: Title template for a newly created pull request.

messages.description: Templates for generated commit messages and pull-request titles.

mode.description: CI policy: skip, observe, or require-passing.

timeoutSeconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for one CI observation cycle.

autoFixAttempts.description: Maximum focused automatic CI-fix attempts. Must be zero unless mode is require-passing.

ci.description: Pull-request check observation and automatic-fix policy.

confirmBeforeRun.description: Ask for confirmation after displaying the selected PR comment and before mutations.

trustedAssociations.description: GitHub author associations allowed to supply review feedback.

reviewFeedback.description: Settings for continuing an open PR from a selected top-level PR comment.
